title: Celebration Apac 100 Yards Polypropylene Decorative Ribbon (100 Yards) (Light Blue)
features: Ribbons are favourites of any florists and loved by all.

Decorate balloons with these great polypropylene ribbons! Also ideal for decorating rooms for parties, chairs, flower bouquets, decorating wedding cars, tables and so much more! Tears easily into any width strip for use in smaller arrangements gifts and fresh or dried flower arrangements.
description: Product Description Ribbons are favourites of any florists and loved by all. Decorate balloons with these great polypropylene ribbons! Also ideal for decorating rooms for parties, chairs, flower bouquets, decorating wedding cars, tables and so much more! Tears easily into any width strip for use in smaller arrangements gifts and fresh or dried flower arrangements. Approx size: 2in x 100 yards. Choice of 10 colours. Box Contains ribbons
